hero.subtitle: Where love stories unfold against Morocco's most extraordinary backdrops — designed with intention, executed with precision.

about.p1: We are a boutique planning studio rooted in Marrakech, crafting celebrations that feel effortlessly beautiful and deeply personal. With nearly two decades of local expertise and a portfolio spanning 40+ countries, we bring international precision to Morocco's most extraordinary settings.
about.p2: Every event we create is guided by one principle:
about.p2_strong: your story deserves to be told with intention

promises.title: The Marrakech Weddings Promise
promises.p1_desc: Every celebration is tailored to your vision, style, culture, and guest experience.
promises.p2_desc: Exclusive access to Morocco’s finest venues, artisans, and trusted vendors.
promises.p3_desc: Planning, production, logistics, and guest flow handled from start to finish.
promises.p4_desc: Elegant experiences rooted in beauty, hospitality, and authentic Moroccan atmosphere.

events.title: Elegant events beyond the wedding day
events.subtitle: Corporate retreats, milestone celebrations, brand activations and private dinners — each one an experience worth remembering.

hero.label: Weddings in Morocco
hero.title: Bespoke Weddings in Morocco
hero.subtitle: From intimate ceremonies to multi-day celebrations, we design weddings that balance beauty, emotion, and flawless coordination.

servicesSection.label: What We Offer
servicesSection.title: Our Wedding Services
servicesSection.subtitle: Tailored excellence for every step of your journey.

services.title: Full Wedding Planning
services.desc: Comprehensive management from concept to the final dance, ensuring every detail is perfectly realized.

services.title: Wedding Design & Styling
services.desc: Creating a cohesive visual narrative through floral design, lighting, and bespoke decor.

services.title: Destination Wedding Coordination
services.desc: Expert logistics for couples traveling to Morocco, managing travel, venues, and local vendors.

services.title: Elopements & Intimate Weddings
services.desc: Curating deeply personal and breathtaking ceremonies for smaller, more private celebrations.

services.title: Multi-Day Wedding Weekends
services.desc: Designing a full journey for your guests, from welcome dinners to farewell brunches.

services.title: Cultural & Fusion Weddings
services.desc: Respectfully blending traditions and cultures into a unique and harmonious celebration.

venuesSection.label: Where We Celebrate
venuesSection.title: Celebrate in Morocco's Most Extraordinary Settings
venuesSection.subtitle: From the hidden riads of the Medina to the majestic expanse of the Sahara.

venues.title: Luxury Riads
venues.desc: Hidden behind carved doors, Marrakech riads offer intimate courtyards, candlelit dinners, and a sense of cinematic privacy.
highlights: Ideal for intimate to mid-size celebrations

venues.title: Private Villas & Estates
venues.desc: A private residence feel with elevated hospitality — space for multi-day hosting, poolside gatherings, and relaxed luxury.

venues.title: Palaces & Gardens
venues.desc: Grand architecture, heritage details, and lush gardens for couples who want a statement-making, regal celebration.
highlights: Ideal for formal receptions & live entertainment

venues.title: Desert Camps
venues.desc: A sunset ceremony, lantern-lit dining, and music under the stars — the Sahara is Morocco at its most unforgettable.
highlights: Perfect for elopements or bold weekend events

venues.title: Beachfront Venues
venues.desc: Ocean air, golden light, and relaxed sophistication — coastal venues bring effortless romance with refined styling.
highlights: Great for guest excursions & seaside brunches

editorial.label: Our Philosophy
editorial.title: Artistry In Every Detail
editorial.body: We believe a wedding should be a sensory experience. Our editorial approach to design ensures that every element — from the scent of the flowers to the transition of the lighting — contributes to a cohesive and breathtaking narrative. We curate the entire guest journey with a focus on high-end entertainment and immersive tablescapes.

themesSection.label: Inspiration
themesSection.title: Wedding Themes & Inspiration
themesSection.subtitle: Discover themes that resonate with Morocco's soul and your personal style.

includedSection.title: The Full Planning Scope
includedSection.subtitle: A comprehensive approach to your celebration.

included.title: Concept development
included.desc: Developing a unique visual and experiential concept that tells your story.

included.title: Venue sourcing
included.desc: Curating a list of Morocco's most extraordinary settings for your celebration.

included.title: Budget guidance
included.desc: Strategic planning and transparent management of your wedding investment.

included.title: Vendor selection and management
included.desc: Connecting you with the most talented local and international creative partners.

included.title: Design direction and moodboards
included.desc: Creation of detailed moodboards focusing on every visual element of your day.

included.title: Guest logistics and hospitality
included.desc: Managing hospitality, transport, and experiences for your traveling guests.

included.title: Ceremony and reception flow
included.desc: Designing the seamless choreography of your ceremony and reception.

included.title: On-the-day coordination
included.desc: Absolute peace of mind while we oversee every second of your celebration.

faqs.q: How far in advance should we start?
faqs.a: For destination weddings in Morocco, we recommend starting 10–12 months in advance to secure your preferred venue and top-tier vendors.

faqs.q: Do you work with international couples?
faqs.a: Yes, the majority of our clients are international couples. We are experts in handling remote planning and guest logistics.

faqs.q: Can you plan multicultural or symbolic ceremonies?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We specialise in fusion weddings and can assist with finding celebrants for symbolic, secular, or religious ceremonies.

faqs.q: Do you assist with guest experiences and accommodation?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide full hospitality management including accommodation booking, local tours, and transport for your guests.

ctaSection.label: Ready?
ctaSection.title: Plan Your Wedding
ctaSection.subtitle: Let's start crafting your extraordinary celebration in Morocco today.

hero.label: Events in Morocco
hero.title: Refined Events, Beautifully Managed
hero.subtitle: We design elegant private and corporate events across Morocco with the same precision, style, and hospitality that define our weddings.

categoriesSection.label: What We Offer
categoriesSection.title: Event Categories
categoriesSection.subtitle: Positioned beyond weddings — crafted with the same precision, artistry, and hospitality.

categories.title: Engagement Parties
categories.desc: Celebrating your first steps into forever with intimate candlelit settings and bespoke Moroccan charm.
categories.detail: A beautifully hosted engagement celebration that sets the tone for everything to come — designed like an editorial moment, managed like a production.
highlights: Guest flow, timing, and on-site coordination

categories.title: Bridal Showers & Welcome Dinners
categories.desc: Elegant pre-wedding gatherings that set the tone for an unforgettable celebration ahead.
categories.detail: From refined bridal showers to welcome dinners in the Medina, we create warm, elevated moments that feel effortless for you and unforgettable for your guests.

categories.title: Anniversaries & Private Celebrations
categories.desc: Meaningful milestones marked with personalised design, exclusive venues, and heartfelt details.
categories.detail: Anniversaries, proposals, private dinners, and milestone moments — crafted with intimacy, beauty, and seamless execution across Morocco.

categories.title: Luxury Birthdays
categories.desc: From lavish rooftop parties to intimate desert dinners — milestones deserve a statement.
categories.detail: A luxury birthday should feel like a world of its own — whether it's a rooftop soirée, a villa party, or a desert celebration under the stars.

categories.title: Brand Experiences
categories.desc: Immersive brand activations and editorial productions set against Morocco's most stunning backdrops.
categories.detail: Premium brand activations, launches, dinners, and editorial productions — delivered with creative direction, technical precision, and impeccable guest experience.

categories.title: Corporate Gatherings
categories.desc: Prestigious corporate events, executive retreats, and galas delivered with precision and sophistication.
categories.detail: Corporate gatherings across Morocco — executive dinners, retreats, incentive experiences, and galas — planned with discretion, clarity, and polish.

promiseSection.title: Our Event Promise
promiseSection.subtitle: Three pillars that underpin every event we create in Morocco.

promises.title: Strategic Planning
promises.desc: From concept and budgeting to logistics and timeline — every detail is mapped out with precision before a single vendor is booked.

promises.title: Elevated Design
promises.desc: Editorial-quality styling, bespoke florals, atmospheric lighting, and curated entertainment that transforms any space.

promises.title: Seamless Guest Experience
promises.desc: Arrival management, hospitality programming, and on-the-day coordination so your guests experience nothing but joy.

formatsSection.label: Featured Formats
formatsSection.title: Featured Event Formats
formatsSection.subtitle: Our most-requested event settings — each one a world unto itself.

formats.title: Rooftop Dinners in Marrakech
formats.detail: Golden hour, lantern light, and a skyline dinner — elevated hospitality with an editorial Moroccan atmosphere.

formats.title: Garden Soirées
formats.detail: Lush greenery, layered florals, and refined dining — perfect for celebrations that feel romantic and timeless.

formats.title: Desert Experiences
formats.detail: A destination experience that becomes the story — sunset arrivals, luxury dining, and music under the stars.

formats.title: Intimate Private Receptions
formats.detail: A private celebration, perfectly choreographed — for smaller guest counts with exceptional design detail.

formats.title: Brand or Executive Dinners
formats.detail: High-level dinners for brands and executives — discreet, premium, and built around impeccable hospitality.

hero.title: The Experience
hero.subtitle: From A to Z... Marrakech is the destination to celebrate the most beautiful moment of your life.

intro.title: From A to Z...
intro.text: Marrakech Weddings takes care of everything. We build your budget line by line, and we also manage guest planning (transfers, airport welcome, hotels) to support your vision from start to finish. Whatever your budget, celebrating in Marrakech means creating an unforgettable wedding.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.text: Initial meeting to define your unique style and essential priorities.

steps.title: Research
steps.text: Venue scouting based on capacity, location, and your target budget.

steps.title: Selection
steps.text: Choosing the best partners — from catering and photography to florals and beauty teams.

steps.title: Planning
steps.text: Site visits, tasting sessions, timelines, and full vendor alignment.

steps.title: Creation & Gifting
steps.text: Designing save-the-dates, invitations, table plans, and personalized guest touches.

steps.title: Coordination
steps.text: Full management and discreet coordination on your celebration day.

body.p1: Immerse yourself in our {{title}}. Every detail is meticulously planned to provide a breathtaking and flawless experience. Our dedicated team of experts works tirelessly to bring your vision to life, blending authentic Moroccan charm with world-class luxury standards.
body.p2: From venue selection to culinary direction, design aesthetics, and guest management, our holistic approach ensures your event is nothing short of spectacular. Reach out to secure dates and explore available packages.
